scope: Kernel-local source references for MVK core Elementor V4 decision cards and required Elementor V4 context sources; not a documentation mirror.

source_policy.upstream_source_of_truth: Official Elementor documentation remains the upstream source of truth.
source_policy.kernel_role: The Kernel stores structured source refs, claim summaries, scope, limitations, and decision-card or context-source mappings.
source_policy.workbook_policy: Workbook-derived material is educational seed only and is never official Elementor proof.
source_policy.project_availability_policy: Official docs prove documented platform capability only, not availability in a target WordPress project.
source_policy.runtime_policy: Runtime proof requires future browser/runtime evidence and is not created by this manifest.

sources.title: Get started with the Elementor Editor V4

claims.claim: Editor V4 docs describe V4 element activation/version context and V3/V4 coexistence boundaries.

limitations: Does not prove target project availability, constructability, Builder execution, responsive runtime, or production readiness.

sources.title: Explore the V4 features

claims.claim: Explore V4 features documents atomic/V4 element discovery, V4 element grouping, and class context.

limitations: Context source only; does not prove target availability or Builder execution.

sources.title: Div Block element

claims.claim: Div Block is documented as a lightweight generic container for simple structure decisions.

limitations: Does not prove target project availability, constructability, Builder execution, responsive runtime, or production readiness.

sources.title: Flexbox element

claims.claim: Flexbox is documented as a container for flexible layout decisions.

limitations: Does not prove target project availability, constructability, Builder execution, responsive runtime, or production readiness.

sources.title: Create a Grid container

claims.claim: Grid container documentation supports two-dimensional grid layout context.

limitations: Verified as Grid container documentation; a distinct atomic V4 Grid element page was not found during this pass.
Does not prove target availability, Builder execution, runtime behavior, or production readiness.

sources.title: Components

claims.claim: Components are documented as reusable design blocks with synchronization and per-instance customization.
Components documentation states prerequisites such as Atomic elements, Admin-level permissions, and Elementor Pro before target-project use can be claimed.

limitations: Components prerequisites do not prove active Elementor Pro license, current Admin permission, target project availability, constructability, Builder execution, responsive runtime, or production readiness.

sources.title: Nested links

claims.claim: Nested links documentation states V4 does not allow clickable elements inside clickable elements.

limitations: Does not prove Builder execution or runtime click behavior.
